title: specgen: honor empty args for entrypoint specified as `--entrypoint ""`
body:
Users should be able to override containers entrypoint using
`--entrypoint ""` following works fine for **podman** but not for **podman
remote** since `CreateOptions` is not passed over to remote server.

Specgen ignores empty argument for entrypoint so make specgen honor
empty arguments.

Closes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/12521

comments.body: @cevich I think we are reaching some account limits in CI and i am not sure what could we do here. Do you have any ideas about this ?

> I think we are reaching some account limits in CI and i am not sure what could we do here. Do you have any ideas about this ?

It's not our CI, it's the upstream download limit that's being hit (but we're not helping) :disappointed: Multiple PRs are hitting this.  Fix is in https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/103 and https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/12547
